top_recalled.question: Where is the LLM router defined and how does it pick a provider per tier?
top_recalled.answer_excerpt: ModelRouter.call(tier=...) in packages/asil_core/asil_core/llm/router.py. Tier → provider map lives in get_settings().llm_tiers; default profile is `tight`.

top_recalled.question: What does the temporal-proximity scorer return when delta_seconds is zero?
top_recalled.answer_excerpt: Returns confidence=1.0 with derivation "delta_seconds=0 — co-occurrence implies maximum proximity". See packages/asil_temporal/asil_temporal/proximity.py:48.

top_recalled.question: Why did the payments-cascade incident on 2026-04-12 happen?
top_recalled.answer_excerpt: Root cause: payments@v847 deployment 6m before alert. Composite causal score 0.91 (temporal=0.94, lagged-corr=0.88, explicit-ref=0.72). Cascade hit orders → notifications.
